title: Svenska kulturfonden internship at the Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux
content:
Svenska kulturfonden is accepting applications for internships starting in August 2026. Read the full call in Swedish.

The post Svenska kulturfonden internship at the Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

content:

title: Polarise Nordic Film Nights returns for its 5th edition
content:
Polarise Nordic Film Nights returns to Brussels 4–15 March 2026, with films on identity, struggle, and women’s rights, featuring Teemu Nikki’s 100 Liters of Gold.

The post Polarise Nordic Film Nights returns for its 5th edition appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Zoöp Connections 2026
content:
The Institute joins Zoöp Connections 2026, initiated by EUNIC Netherlands, with artist residencies fostering regenerative, more-than-human relationships.

The post Zoöp Connections 2026 appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Are you our next EDUFI intern?
content:
The application period for the EDUFI internship for autumn 2026 is open from 24.2–10.3.2026. The four-month internship at the Institute begins on 17.8. Good luck!

The post Are you our next EDUFI intern? appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
creator: Margareeta Lauronen
sourceTitle: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux
sourceDescription: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux

title: World premieres and a sauna gathering: Finnish film at IFFR 2026
content:
The Institute and partners hosted a networking and sauna event at IFFR 2026, celebrating Finnish film and fostering industry collaboration.

title: Learn Finnish at the first-ever Brussels Multilingualism Week!
content:
Spend Valentine's Day learning Finnish with us at Bourse! The Institute is excited to be part Brussels Multilingualism Week together with the EUNIC Brussels cluster.

The post Learn Finnish at the first-ever Brussels Multilingualism Week! appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Juha Vehmaanperä’s exhibition infuses traditional craft and fashion with punk energy
content:
Finnish knitwear artist Juha Vehmaanperä’s first major solo exhibition, Craft Punk opens at the Gallery of the Architecture & Design Museum on 20.2.2026.

The post Juha Vehmaanperä’s exhibition infuses traditional craft and fashion with punk energy appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

content:

title: 2026: New year, new horizons
content:
